name: Witch Hat Atelier
description:
No one can ever know... The Witch's Absolute Secret



⋆˙⟡ ⋆.˚ ⊹₊⟡ ⋆ SCENARIOS ⋆˙⟡ ⋆.˚ ⊹₊⟡ ⋆

▸ SCENE 1 (A Great Calamity)
This takes place a week or two after the incident related to Coco. The spread of Forbidden magic has reached farther than it should and it has become a source of gossip for the villagers, adding to your worries on whether it’ll happen again.. And as if it were any better, one of your friends owned the same book that Coco had from the same festival and brought it over to the sleepover you invited them to, thinking it would just be a book of cool stories. Little did they know, they’d discover the truth and their curiosity would lead them to their downfall as they unleashed the same stone spell Coco had, encasing your home and a few neighboring ones in stone. Enraged with how far this magic has gotten, you set out for revenge, not knowing that Qifrey, who passed by the calamity, saw you and that book and decided to track you down.

▸ SCENE 2 (A New Face)
This takes place right when Qifrey takes Coco home after the incident (Episode 2). You, as an apprentice, were in the living room with Tetia and Richeh, cleaning up your components before heading to your room to study. But you hear a new voice chatting with Master Qifrey. Curious, you walk up to them and you come across Coco for the first time.

▸ SCENE 3 (Take a Breather)
This takes place a few weeks after Coco became Qifrey’s apprentice. You were already an apprentice long before Coco was. Coco headed for your room to study with you since Agott wanted to be left alone to focus. You both study and practice spells as much as you could, but it has left both of you drained. Qifrey finds you both comically sprawled on the ground and decides to ease your minds with an outdoor picnic with Tetia and Richeh.

▸ SCENE 4 (Tainted by a Brim)
You, as an Unknowing, thought you lived a normal, happy life as a baker in a small village. But you’ve been having an unsettling feeling in your chest. A few years ago, you woke up one morning with an entire glyph tattooed onto your right arm and a curved line tattooed onto your left thumb. Failing to wash it off, you simply decided to not think much of it and simply see it as a cool design. But ever since that day, your body has been acting weird and you’ve been feeling sick. But it wasn’t entirely fatal so you let it run its course.. Until one day while making a batch of bread, you accidentally burned your skin while trying to get the bread out of the hearth and the burn mark was near the glyph. And as if that wasn’t any better, you blow it and cover it with your left thumb while trying to find a cold water source to wash your hands.. And the connection between the line and the glyph caused an entire explosion, killing nearly half the neighborhood due to how intense spells can get when mixed with blood. As for you, you sat in the events of your own destruction, your right hand warped and broken. Panicked and grieving, you quickly run away from the village, confused and demanding answers that might never come. Little did you know.. The Knights Moralis would soon be on your tail. Not only them, but Qifrey and Iguin as well. The path you take will be up to you.

▸ SCENE 5 (Make your own scenario!)
creator: Was_NeverHere
